ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "long_definition" TEXT /* Long definition or description of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or category of the indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the indicator */,
  "periodicity" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "reference_period" TEXT /* Reference period for the indicator */,
  "statistical_concept_methodology" TEXT /* Statistical concept and methodology used for the indicator */,
  "previous_indicator_code" TEXT /* Previous code of the indicator (if applicable) */,
  "previous_indicator_name" TEXT /* Previous name of the indicator (if applicable) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or score of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating or score of the data */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic or demographic coverage of the data */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy rating or score of the data */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, international organization, private) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_periodicity FOREIGN KEY ("periodicity") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_unit_of_measure FOREIGN KEY ("unit_of_measure") REFERENCES units_of_measure ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_reference_period FOREIGN KEY ("reference_period") REFERENCES reference_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region where the country is located */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the data value */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the quality of the data */,
  "data_reliability_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the reliability of the data */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, international organization, private) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or score of the data from the source */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating or score of the data from the source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic or demographic coverage of the data from the source */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy rating or score of the data from the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, international organization, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_type" TEXT /* Type of topic (e.g., economic, social, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measure" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measure */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measure */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit of measure */,
  "standard_unit" TEXT /* Standard unit of measure for conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_type" TEXT /* Type of frequency (e.g., regular, irregular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period (e.g., historical, projected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the historical data is recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator in the historical year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was last updated */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the historical data value */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the quality of the historical data */,
  "data_reliability_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the reliability of the historical data */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the historical data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_topics" (
  "indicator_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator topic link */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_topics_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_units" (
  "indicator_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator unit link */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_units_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_units_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units_of_measure ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_frequencies" (
  "indicator_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator frequency link */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_frequencies_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_frequencies_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)
